rows.definition: cachemeta.RecommendLayout produces the cache-optimal re-ordering of one turn's prompt segments, hoisting every volatile segment (position-independent metadata like a timestamp or request id) to the tail so the most contiguous leading tokens survive as a provider-cacheable prefix, returning a LayoutRecommendation with the predicted uplift.
rows.distinction: Not ctxplan.PlanLayout, which plans an O(1) context-window view over stored conversation spans; RecommendLayout reorders prompt segments to maximize provider prefix-cache hit length and never pages in span bytes.

rows.definition: cachemeta.LayoutRecommendation is the struct returned by RecommendLayout: the reordered segment list, the count of moved volatile segments, the before/after contiguous cacheable-token counts, and the predicted cacheable-token uplift for one turn.
rows.distinction: Not the kvLayout interface (a model KV-cache memory layout) nor ctxplan's Layout; it is a prompt-segment reorder recommendation describing how to restructure a turn for provider prefix-cache stability.

rows.definition: model.mlaKVLayout is the kvLayout implementation for MLA models that caches a compressed latent c_KV plus a pre-RoPE decoupled key per position, then up-projects the latent to full per-head K/V and rotates the shared key on read, shrinking the cache ~10-50x versus the per-head width.
rows.distinction: Not standardKVLayout, whose reconstruction is the identity over stored post-RoPE K/V; mlaKVLayout decompresses a low-rank latent (decompress-then-attend) rather than handing back stored rows verbatim.

rows.definition: model.standardKVLayout is the default Llama/Qwen kvLayout: the cache stores post-RoPE K and V directly at width NumKVHeads*HeadDim, so reconstructKV is the identity that splits and hands back the stored rows, keeping the path bit-identical to inline blockStep attention.
rows.distinction: Not mlaKVLayout, which stores a compressed latent and up-projects it on read; standardKVLayout does no projection or re-rotation and caches the full per-head K/V uncompressed.

rows.definition: model.Model.modelLayout() is the selector method that returns mlaKVLayout when the model has MLA projection geometry (Model.MLA != nil) and otherwise returns the default standardKVLayout, choosing which KV-cache layout a given model uses.
rows.distinction: Not the kvLayout interface itself (kvlayout-interface) and not ctxplan's context Layout; modelLayout is the per-Model dispatcher that picks between the two concrete KV layouts at read/write time.
